roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:60 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  16  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:CLIENT MAY SERVE HIS SENTENCE THROUGH A RESIDENTIAL DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM,  CLIENT MUST COMPLETE 60 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT AT HEALTHRIGHT360,  HE WILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAM BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT ON WEDNESDAY, SEPTEMBER 24, 2014,  ADULT PAROLE HAS THEDISCRETION TO MODIFY TREATMENT,COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO REINSTATE PAROLE AS OF 8-8-2014 WITHOUT ANY TIME LOSS,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLEUPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONSGIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/
